Pseudocount added to all entries before log transformation to handle zeros

966 vs 942: The prevalence sweep (Supp Table 3b) counted 966 genus-resolved lineages at threshold>=50, but was computed on all soil samples including those later excluded for low read depth. After removing samples with <5000 reads during CLR matrix construction, 24 of those 966 genera fell below the threshold, leaving 942 genus-resolved features in the final matrix. Additionally, 591 partial-taxonomy lineages (resolved to phylum through family but not genus) independently pass threshold>=50 and are included as features. Final matrix: 942 + 591 = 1533 lineages x 2209 samples.
